edition.dagbeeld: De 250ste verjaardag van de VS domineerde het nieuws met Trumps vertraagde toespraak, extreem weer en witte nationalisten op de Mall — terwijl de wereld verder draait: Khamenei's uitvaart in Teheran, massaprotesten in Albanië en Turkije dat zijn NAVO-gewicht vergroot. In Nederland houdt de nasleep van de WK-rellen en de terugkerende militairen in Soesterberg de gemoederen bezig.

article.title: Ukraine striking Russian energy infrastructure at unprecedented rate
article.summary: Kyiv’s intensified drone campaign is spurring Russia’s worst fuel crisis in decades

opening.note: Oekraïne drijft Rusland in zwaarste brandstofcrisis in decennia — voortzetting van tophoofdstuk.
opening.label: onderzoek

article.title: Israel Is Not Invincible
article.summary: There is suddenly daylight between the Trump administration and Netanyahu.

front.note: Zichtbare breuk tussen Trump en Netanyahu; Israël verliest zijn onaantastbare status.
front.label: analyse

article.title: In Fourth of July Speech, Trump Celebrates America and Derides Foes
article.summary: A centerpiece address for the nation’s 250th anniversary celebration devoted time to American history, but had all the hallmarks of a Trump rally.

front.note: Trump's speech op de 250ste verjaardag: historisch jasje, vertrouwde rallyretoriek.
front.label: reportage

article.title: Tehran sees crowds gather to pray on second day of funeral ceremonies for Iran's Ali Khamenei
article.summary: Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian attended the ceremony on Sunday, accompanied by Iranian allies and members of the team currently negotiating with the US after an initial ceasefire in the US-Israeli war against Iran.

front.note: Tweede dag uitvaart Khamenei in Teheran; regionale bondgenoten aanwezig.
front.label: breaking

article.title: Could Farage quit? Questions swirl over Reform UK leader’s future
article.summary: Leader is under pressure over £5m gift, byelection losses and rise of rival Restore but allies say exit speculation is ‘wishful thinking’

front.note: Farage onder druk door schandalen en rivalen — toekomst Reform UK onzeker.
front.label: analyse

article.title: Turkey sees its status in NATO rise, thanks to its weapons factories and Trump
article.summary: A friendship between presidents Donald Trump and Recep Tayyip Erdogan, and a need for weapons production, has changed how other NATO countries treat Turkey.

front.note: Turkije groeit uit tot onmisbare NAVO-partner dankzij wapenindustrie en Trump-band.
front.label: analyse

article.title: ME grijpt in meerdere steden in na ongeregeldheden rond WK-zege Marokko
article.summary: De Mobiele Eenheid (ME) heeft zaterdagavond in Rotterdam, Utrecht en Den Haag ingegrepen na ongeregeldheden rond de WK-overwinning van Marokko op Canada.

front.note: ME greep in Rotterdam, Utrecht en Den Haag in na WK-rellen rond Marokko-zege.
front.label: reportage

article.title: Tienduizenden Albanezen bij 35e protest tegen de regering en een Trump-resort
article.summary: In de Albanese hoofdstad Tirana hebben tienduizenden mensen geprotesteerd tegen de regering van premier Rama, tegen corruptie en voor een verandering van de grondwet. Het was de 35e avond achtereen dat Albanezen daarvoor de straat op gingen. In het begin ging dat protest nog tegen de bouw van een luxe toeristenresort d

front.note: Tienduizenden Albanezen eisen af van corrupte regering en Trumps resort in Tirana.

items.title: French push to exclude UK from EU defence spending backfires
items.summary: Paris loses out on cheap loans due to strict eligibility criteria it had championed

items.title: Peruvian and Colombian presidential elections: Expatriate vote helps far right clinch victory
items.summary: Peruvians living abroad helped Keiko Fujimori to win the presidency, even though only a minority of Peru's residents voted for her. Expatriate Colombians also massively backed Abelardo de la Espriella, though this was not as decisive.

items.title: Terwijl de AfD nog een tikje naar rechts opschuift, klinkt in Erfurt uit vele kelen: ‘We zijn allemaal antifascisten’

items.summary: While both sides said the calls were to mark the 250th birthday of the US, Ukraine – and, during the call with the Kremlin, Iran – were also discussed.

items.title: White Nationalists March in Washington Amid 250th Anniversary Celebrations
items.summary: The group, wearing clothing associated with the organization Patriot Front, assembled near Capitol Hill before leaving the district.

items.title: White House deletes thousands of web pages about energy conservation as heatwave slams US
items.summary: The US Department of Energy reportedly deleted about 6,000 pages related to energy conservation as a historic heatwave tears across the country. items.title: China cools on overseas publication of scientific research
items.summary: Policymakers discuss reducing incentives for academics to submit papers to international journals over leak concerns

items.title: Soesterberg is blij met komst van militairen, maar vreest voor leefbaarheid
items.summary: Ruim dertig jaar na het vertrek van de laatste Amerikaanse soldaten uit Soesterberg komen er weer militaire uniformen in het straatbeeld. De oudere inwoners hebben goede herinneringen aan Defensie in hun dorp, maar nieuwe bewoners vragen zich af wat de komst van zoveel nieuwe inwoners doet met de leefbaarheid. Onlangs

items.title: In San Francisco’s A.I. Era, Even $180,000 Tech Salaries Are No Longer Enough
items.summary: As OpenAI and Anthropic prepare to go public, tech workers making six figures are grousing that they cannot compete with the new A.I. elite. Some doubt they can afford to stay.

items.title: How Bending Spoons built a $23bn tech empire from struggling brands
items.summary: Nasdaq listing caps more than a decade of deals that transformed an Italian start-up into a global internet company

items.title: NASA launched an emergency mission to stop the Swift Observatory from crashing to Earth
items.summary: The Swift Observatory was launched in 2004, but recent solar storms have pushed its orbit lower, and it's in danger of burning up in Earth's atmosphere as soon as this year. To try and stave off its demise, NASA has enlisted Katalyst Space Technologies. The company's Link spacecraft launched Friday with the goal of int

items.title: Uber stalls European food delivery push as it pursues Delivery Hero takeover
items.summary: Ride-hailing company will no longer launch in five of its seven planned new markets this year

items.title: De Lelystadse jeugdzorg wordt steeds duurder. De directeur die daar iets aan deed, moest vertrekken
items.summary: In Lelystad woedde het afgelopen halfjaar een ongekende politieke machtsstrijd rondom jeugdhulp. Een experiment om de stijgende kosten in de hand te houden, kwam tot een lelijk einde. Daarmee verdoezelt de gemeente hoe slecht zij zelf heeft gepresteerd.

items.title: Pope Leo’s July 4 Message to America Was Unmistakable
items.summary: By spending the semiquincentennial mourning the plight of migrants, Leo sent a clear challenge to his native country.

items.title: America’s Most Enduring Belief Is Also One of Its Most Dangerous
items.summary: How the simultaneous deaths of two Founding Fathers entrenched the idea that the United States was chosen by God

items.title: France’s far right didn’t drop its grudge against Les Bleus. It recast it.
items.summary: What was once an attack on immigration and identity has become an attack on privilege and elitism — a shift that mirrors the party’s path toward the presidency.

items.title: What Does It Cost to Take Over Madison Square Garden?
items.summary: It’s not just rent. There’s security, insurance, permits and other costs, not to mention extra police presence.

items.summary: Zorgen is meer iets voor meisjes, krijgen veel jongens al vroeg mee. Niet verbazend dat zij daarin vervolgens achterblijven, schrijft Eva Marie de Waal . Laten we al onze kinderen opvoeden tot emotioneel volwassen mensen.
